steps.description_he: Take a photo of your work, record a voice note, or type a message. Send it to your MutelAI bot via WhatsApp or email - just like texting a friend.
steps.description_en: Take a photo of your work, record a voice note, or type a message. Send it to your MutelAI bot via WhatsApp or email - just like texting a friend.

steps.description_he: Our AI analyzes your content, writes professional marketing copy, optimizes images, and determines exactly where to place it on your site.
steps.description_en: Our AI analyzes your content, writes professional marketing copy, optimizes images, and determines exactly where to place it on your site.

steps.description_he: Within seconds, your website is updated with fresh, SEO-optimized content. Your customers see your latest work - automatically.
steps.description_en: Within seconds, your website is updated with fresh, SEO-optimized content. Your customers see your latest work - automatically.

services.desc_he: Snap, send via WhatsApp or email, and it's live. The AI writes the copy, optimizes your media, and updates your customers with zero manual effort.
services.desc_en: Snap, send via WhatsApp or email, and it's live. The AI writes the copy, optimizes your media, and updates your customers with zero manual effort.

services.desc_he: Our system analyzes every photo and text, understands the context of the job, and places it perfectly on your site. Content is automatically translated into multiple languages simultaneously.
services.desc_en: Our system analyzes every photo and text, understands the context of the job, and places it perfectly on your site. Content is automatically translated into multiple languages simultaneously.

services.desc_he: Our technology ensures Google finds you exactly when customers search for your services locally. We build lightning-fast infrastructure; the AI builds your reputation.
services.desc_en: Our technology ensures Google finds you exactly when customers search for your services locally. We build lightning-fast infrastructure; the AI builds your reputation.

services.desc_he: No suffocating monthly rentals. You pay for the setup, and the website is yours forever. No hidden fees, no fine print.
services.desc_en: No suffocating monthly rentals. You pay for the setup, and the website is yours forever. No hidden fees, no fine print.

pricing.desc_he: Everything you need to launch. We build it, you own it.
pricing.desc_en: Everything you need to launch. We build it, you own it.

pricing.desc_he: The autopilot for your business growth.
pricing.desc_en: The autopilot for your business growth.

pricing.desc_he: The passive route to keep your site live.
pricing.desc_en: The passive route to keep your site live.

faq.question_he: Do I actually own the website?
faq.question_en: Do I actually own the website?
faq.answer_he: Absolutely. Your initial setup fee purchases the digital asset. Even if you choose not to use the Premium AI service in the future, the website remains 100% yours. We believe in ownership, not rentals.
faq.answer_en: Absolutely. Your initial setup fee purchases the digital asset. Even if you choose not to use the Premium AI service in the future, the website remains 100% yours. We believe in ownership, not rentals.

faq.question_he: I'm not a tech person. Will I be able to use this?
faq.question_en: I'm not a tech person. Will I be able to use this?
faq.answer_he: Our philosophy is simple: If you know how to send a picture on WhatsApp, you know how to run this website. The AI handles all the complex formatting, copywriting, and coding behind the scenes. You just send a message.
faq.answer_en: Our philosophy is simple: If you know how to send a picture on WhatsApp, you know how to run this website. The AI handles all the complex formatting, copywriting, and coding behind the scenes. You just send a message.

faq.question_he: What if I need my website in multiple languages?
faq.question_en: What if I need my website in multiple languages?
faq.answer_he: Our Premium AI service includes native multilingual support. You send the update in your native language via WhatsApp or email, and the system instantly translates and publishes it across all your selected languages - currently supporting 15+ languages.
faq.answer_en: Our Premium AI service includes native multilingual support. You send the update in your native language via WhatsApp or email, and the system instantly translates and publishes it across all your selected languages - currently supporting 15+ languages.

faq.question_he: How fast will my website be?
faq.question_en: How fast will my website be?
faq.answer_he: Extremely fast. We build static, edge-deployed sites that score 95+ on Google PageSpeed. Fast loading times mean better SEO rankings and more customers finding you online.
faq.answer_en: Extremely fast. We build static, edge-deployed sites that score 95+ on Google PageSpeed. Fast loading times mean better SEO rankings and more customers finding you online.

faq.answer_he: After the first year, you can choose to continue with our Premium AI Manager ($12/mo) for full autopilot, or switch to Core Maintenance ($5/mo) to keep your domain and hosting active. Either way, your website content remains yours.
faq.answer_en: After the first year, you can choose to continue with our Premium AI Manager ($12/mo) for full autopilot, or switch to Core Maintenance ($5/mo) to keep your domain and hosting active. Either way, your website content remains yours.

hero_description.he: The website that works for you, while you work in the field. Launch a professional, fully AI-managed digital asset that updates directly from your WhatsApp or email. No laptop, no passwords - just send a message, and your site is live.
hero_description.en: The website that works for you, while you work in the field. Launch a professional, fully AI-managed digital asset that updates directly from your WhatsApp or email. No laptop, no passwords - just send a message, and your site is live.

hero_cta_note.he: First month of Premium AI is on us!
hero_cta_note.en: First month of Premium AI is on us!

demo_description.he: Finished a project? Snap a photo and send it via WhatsApp or email. The AI analyzes it, writes professional marketing copy, and updates your site in seconds.
demo_description.en: Finished a project? Snap a photo and send it via WhatsApp or email. The AI analyzes it, writes professional marketing copy, and updates your site in seconds.

demo_bot_reply.he: ✨ Got it! New project added with AI-written copy. Your site is updated!
demo_bot_reply.en: ✨ Got it! New project added with AI-written copy. Your site is updated!

pricing_subtitle.he: One simple setup fee. You own your website forever.
pricing_subtitle.en: One simple setup fee. You own your website forever.

footer_description.he: Your next customer is searching for you right now. Let's make sure they find you.
footer_description.en: Your next customer is searching for you right now. Let's make sure they find you.
